ddls:
CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin node or location */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination node or location */,
  "demand" INTEGER /* Quantity or volume of goods to be delivered */,
  "release_time" INTEGER /* Time when the delivery is released or begins */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Deadline by which the delivery must be completed */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle assigned to the delivery */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver assigned to the delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the delivery (e.g., in-transit, completed) */,
  "delivery_type" TEXT /* Category of the delivery (e.g., same-day, next-day, express) */,
  "delivery_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the delivery (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the node */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., origin, destination, intermediate) */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the node (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., in-use, available) */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., good, average, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the driver */,
  "driver_license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  "driver_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery route */,
  "delivery_id" TEXT /* Reference to the delivery */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Time when the route starts */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* Time when the route ends */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption for the route */,
  "expected_duration" INTEGER /* Expected duration of the route */,
  "route_status" TEXT /* Status of the route (e.g., planned, in-progress, completed) */,
  "route_distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the route distance (e.g., kilometers, miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_routes_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery route */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node involved in the segment */,
  "segment_distance" REAL /* Distance of the segment */,
  "segment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the segment */,
  "arrival_time" INTEGER /* Time when the vehicle arrives at the node */,
  "departure_time" INTEGER /* Time when the vehicle departs from the node */,
  "segment_status" TEXT /* Status of the segment (e.g., planned, in-progress, completed) */,
  "segment_traffic_condition" TEXT /* Traffic condition of the segment (e.g., heavy, moderate, light) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_segments_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_segments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES delivery_routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "customer_rating" INTEGER /* Rating or feedback of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., electronics, furniture, food) */,
  "product_weight_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the product weight (e.g., kilograms, pounds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_products" (
  "delivery_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery product entry */,
  "delivery_id" TEXT /* Reference to the delivery */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the delivery */,
  "product_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product during delivery (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_products_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "delivery_id" TEXT /* Reference to the delivery */,
  "update_time" INTEGER /* Time when the status update occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the delivery */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delivery_status_updates_delivery_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_id") REFERENCES deliveries ("delivery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_cost_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the maintenance cost (e.g., dollars, euros) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Time when the shift starts */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* Time when the shift ends */,
  "shift_type" TEXT /* Type of shift (e.g., day, night) */,
  "shift_status" TEXT /* Status of the shift (e.g., in-progress, completed) */,
  "shift_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_shifts_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)
